headline: Dow Jones Futures: Oil Prices, Iran War Drive Stocks Lower; Nvidia GTC, Micron Earnings Due
summary: The stock market fell for a third straight week, breaking or testing key levels, as oil prices soared amid the Iran war. Nvidia GTC and Micron earnings loom.

headline: Micron Drums Up Support Into Earnings. Rising Memory Prices Are a Boon to the Stock.
summary: Micron Technology has surged 302% over the past 12 months. Those gains might continue, say analysts.

headline: Jim Cramer Says Micron Could Be “Bought on a Big Move Down Because of Oil”

headline: STX Stock Beats Industry Returns in 3 Months: Right Time to Invest?
summary: Seagate rides the AI data boom as HAMR-based Mozaic drives gain cloud traction and nearline capacity is booked through 2026. High debt remains a risk.

headline: HP Enterprise confirms memory shortage will last longer than expected
summary: “I keep thinking this has got to end, but we got confirmation this week from HP Enterprise that it’s going to go on for much longer than people think.” That’s Jim Cramer, and the “it” he’s referring to is the global memory shortage that has quietly become one of the most consequential supply stories in ... HP Enterprise confirms memory shortage will last longer than expected

headline: Tech Trends Turned Memory Players Into Powerful AI Stocks. What Investors Should Know.
summary: Artificial intelligence turned memory tech names like Western Digital, Seagate and SanDisk into high-flying AI stocks. But don't forget these players' boom-bust cycles.
